channel.title: LLM Timeline — Mistral Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from Mistral.

item.title: Devstral 2 (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: Devstral 2 License: open Type: model SWE-bench Verified=72.2%.

item.title: Mistral Large 3 (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: Mistral Large 3 License: open Type: model 675BA41B. "Mistral Large 3 joins the ranks of frontier instruction-fine-tuned open-source models." EU tech doc: https://legal.cms.mistral.ai/assets/1e37fffd-7ea5-469b-822f-05dcfbb43623

item.title: Devstral Medium (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: Devstral Medium License: open Type: model Non-reasoning.

item.title: Magistral Medium (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: Magistral Medium License: open Type: model Magistral Small=24B. Announce: https://mistral.ai/news/magistral

item.title: Mistral Medium 3 (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: Mistral Medium 3 License: open Type: model Multimodal. 50B param estimate based on "Mistral Medium 3 can also be deployed on any cloud, including self-hosted environments of four GPUs and above.". Note: "With the launches of Mistral Small in March and Mistral Medium today, it’s no secret that we’re working on something ‘large’ over the next few weeks. With even our medium-sized model being resoundingly better than flagship open source models such as Llama 4 Maverick, we’re excited to ‘open’ up what’s to come :) "

item.title: Mistral Small 3.1 (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: Mistral Small 3.1 License: open Type: model "Mistral Small 3.1 (2503) adds state-of-the-art vision understanding and enhances long context capabilities up to 128k tokens without compromising text performance."

item.title: Mistral Saba (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: Mistral Saba License: open Type: model "Mistral Saba is a 24B parameter model trained on meticulously curated datasets from across the Middle East and South Asia."

item.title: Mistral Small 3 (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: Mistral Small 3 License: open Type: model MMLU=base, -Pro=base, GPQA=instruct. "When quantized, Mistral Small 3 can be run privately on a single RTX 4090 or a Macbook with 32GB RAM." "Mistral Small 3 is neither trained with RL nor synthetic data"

item.title: Pixtral Large (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: Pixtral Large License: open Type: model Open-weights multimodal model built on top of Mistral Large 2.

item.title: Ministral 8B (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: Ministral 8B License: open Type: model "Introducing the world’s best edge models"

item.title: Pixtral-12b-240910 (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: Pixtral-12b-240910 License: open Type: model "Pixtral was trained to be a drop-in replacement for Mistral Nemo 12B."

item.title: Mistral Large 2 (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: Mistral Large 2 License: open Type: model Fits on a single node for inference.

item.title: NeMo (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: NeMo License: open Type: model With NVIDIA. "Drop-in replacement of Mistral 7B". "trained using Megatron-LM, part of NVIDIA NeMo, with 3,072 H100 80GB Tensor Core GPUs" https://blogs.nvidia.com/blog/mistral-nvidia-ai-model/

item.title: Codestral Mamba (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: Codestral Mamba License: open Type: model "Unlike Transformer models, Mamba models offer the advantage of linear time inference and the theoretical ability to model sequences of infinite length."

item.title: Mathstral (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: Mathstral License: open Type: model "We’re contributing Mathstral to the science community to bolster efforts in advanced mathematical problems requiring complex, multi-step logical reasoning."

item.title: Codestral (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: Codestral License: open Type: model Fluent in 80+ programming languages

item.title: mixtral-8x22b (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: mixtral-8x22b License: open Type: model MoE=22Bx8, seq=65536.

item.title: Mistral Small (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: Mistral Small License: open Type: model Optimised for latency and cost.

item.title: Mistral Large (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: Mistral Large License: open Type: model MMLU=81.2 (same as Flan-PaLM 2 340B, higher than PaLM 2 340B MMLU=78.3), 32k context window. API only (not open source).

item.title: miqu 70b (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: miqu 70b License: open Type: model Leaked, proper version soon: https://venturebeat.com/ai/mistral-ceo-confirms-leak-of-new-open-source-ai-model-nearing-gpt-4-performance/

item.title: Mistral-medium (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: Mistral-medium License: open Type: model MMLU=75.3% (GPT-3.5-turbo 20B=70%, Llama 2 70B=68.9%)

item.title: mixtral-8x7b-32kseqlen (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: mixtral-8x7b-32kseqlen License: open Type: model MoE=7Bx8, aka mistral-small. 'Concretely, Mixtral has 45B total parameters but only uses 12B parameters per token. It, therefore, processes input and generates output at the same speed and for the same cost as a 12B model.'

item.title: Mistral 7B (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: Mistral 7B License: open Type: model Apache 2.0, Sliding Window Attention (SWA) to handle longer sequences at smaller cost
